# youtrack_system_settings (Resource)

YouTrack system settings resource. This resource manages the global system settings in YouTrack, such as administrator email, maximum export items, and other global configurations.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "youtrack_system_settings" "server_config" {
  administrator_email         = "test@youtrack.com"
  max_export_items            = 500
  max_upload_file_size        = 10485760
  allow_statistics_collection = false
  is_application_read_only    = false
  base_url                    = "localhost:8080"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `base_url` (String) Base URL of the YouTrack instance.

### Optional

- `administrator_email` (String) Email address of the YouTrack administrator.
- `allow_statistics_collection` (Boolean) Indicates whether YouTrack is allowed to collect usage statistics. Default is false.
- `is_application_read_only` (Boolean) Indicates whether the YouTrack application is in read-only mode. Default is false.
- `max_export_items` (Number) Maximum number of items that can be exported at once. Default is 1000.
- `max_upload_file_size` (Number) Maximum file size (in bytes) that can be uploaded to YouTrack. Default is 10485760 (10MB).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) System settings identifier (always 'global').
- `last_updated` (String) Timestamp of the last update

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# System settings is a singleton resource.
# You can use any value for the import ID (it will be ignored).
# The resource will fetch the current global system settings.
terraform import youtrack_system_settings.server_config global
```
